title: kinostemon ornatus
side_effects: Kinostemon ornatus can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches, which may be caused by consuming excessive amounts of its toxic compounds. In some cases, using the plant for medicinal purposes without proper guidance can lead to liver and kidney damage. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic substances can also cause skin irritation, rashes, and allergic reactions in sensitive individuals. Furthermore, ingesting large quantities of the plant can lead to respiratory problems, including difficulty breathing and asthma-like symptoms.
